Butterfly Foundation · 501(c)(3)

Mental health is everyone's story.

We're building shared infrastructure for mental health — a universal symbol, a viral challenge, a 30-second protocol, and a month every May.

Join the Movement → Our Mission
WHO recommended 100+ studies 30 years of research
Hands raised 12,847,392
Take part →
The scale

A crisis hiding in plain sight.

1 billion
People living with a mental health condition worldwide.
11 years
Average wait from first symptom to professional help.
$5 trillion
Lost annually to untreated mental illness globally.
1 / 3
How it works

Many. One. Billion.

How one gesture reaches a billion people — and how organizations learn to respond when they see it.

The Challenge

Millions learn the butterfly sign — creators, athletes, students. One 60-second video at a time.

Join the Challenge

The Protocol

A 30-second response anyone can learn — the global standard for mental health response.

Learn the Protocol

The Impact

Every classroom, workplace, and community carries a shared response — measured, compliant, and proven.

See the Impact
Our work

Four ways we're changing the world.

A symbol, a challenge, a month, and what comes next — the four programs that carry the mission.

The Butterfly Symbol.

Two hands crossed over the chest — establishing the butterfly as the world's universal symbol for mental health.

The Butterfly Challenge.

A viral movement teaching the butterfly hand sign to billions — one 60-second video at a time.

Butterfly Month.

Every May, starting 2026. Transforming Mental Health Awareness Month into a globally recognized activation.

ONETOPIA Festival.

The world's first global benefit festival for mental health. Culture, care, community.
1 / 4
For organizations

Mental health belongs in every space.

Whether you lead a classroom, a team, or a brand — we have free tools built for you.

For Schools

Give every classroom the protocol.

A 10-minute lesson plan, teacher & counselor guide, COPPA-compliant — and free.

Download Classroom Kit →
For Workplaces

Deploy the protocol in 90 days.

Manager training in 10 minutes. Legal-ready, privacy-first, zero PHI.

Request Deployment Brief →
For Brands

Lead the conversation your audience wants.

Category-exclusive partnership with May activation kits and a founding-alliance seat.

Become a Partner →
Founder
The pandemic forced me to face something I'd been ignoring my whole life. If I — with every resource available — was struggling, what about the billions without those resources?
Evan Klassen
Founder, Butterfly Foundation

If you need support

You don't have to do this alone.

988
Suicide & Crisis Lifeline

Free, confidential, and available any time — day or night. Call or text, no cost, no judgment.
